BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin on the Portugal fund after Kaitlyn floated maybe-spring. How much do I need to set aside monthly to hit a realistic budget for two.

CurrentState.Note: Rough only. 'Revenue' here = what I can realistically move into the Portugal fund each month from freelance + skimming. Loan line (182) is the non-negotiable.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Target trip budget ~$2,800/person if we go in spring 2027
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: $5,600 target for two / ~$207 saved per month = ~27 months. Started Dec 2025, so spring 2028 at this pace unless freelance picks up.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Tight. Need to push freelance gigs or bump the monthly transfer.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Stretch case - skip a few brunches, $300/mo into the fund
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: If I can hit $300/mo, spring 2027 is actually doable. Talk to Kaitlyn about a real date.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: At ~$207/mo I'm looking at 2+ years. A couple of steady freelance months plus a tighter coffee/brunch line gets me to spring 2027. The fund's at $840 now.
ActionItems: Bump the weekly Portugal transfer from $18 to $25 if June freelance lands
Pin Kaitlyn down on a rough travel window before fall
